mapper.sql: id , phone, acount, eqno, idno, qrcode, nickname, icon, sex, img, chat_img, sign, state, balance, password, paypwd, mbid, mbname, mbda, ziti, show_quan, is_add_yz, is_quan_tx, is_msg_tx, acc_serch, phone_serch, gro_add, mp_add, qr_add, xcxurl, eqid, kfid, invitid, huanying, create_date, update_date, isneibu, ipwhite, city, model, regip, noadd, isvip, viptime, qrcode2, lianghao, endtime, autofanyi, biandabianyi, withhold, payment_Address, receiving_Address,two_factor_code,point_total,two_factor_time

a . id AS "id", a.phone AS "phone", a.acount AS "acount", a.eqno AS "eqno", a.idno AS "idno", a.qrcode AS "qrcode", a.qrcode2 AS "qrcode2", a.nickname AS "nickname", a.icon AS "icon", a.sex AS "sex", a.img AS "img", a.chat_img AS "chatImg", a.sign AS "sign", a.state AS "state", a.balance AS "balance", a.password AS "password", a.paypwd AS "paypwd", a.mbid AS "mb.id", a.mbname AS "mbname", a.mbda AS "mbda", a.ziti AS "ziti", a.show_quan AS "showQuan", a.is_add_yz AS "isAddYz", a.is_quan_tx AS "isQuanTx", a.is_msg_tx AS "isMsgTx", a.acc_serch AS "accSerch", a.phone_serch AS "phoneSerch", a.gro_add AS "groAdd", a.mp_add AS "mpAdd", a.qr_add AS "qrAdd", a.xcxurl AS "xcxurl", a.eqid AS "eqid", a.kfid AS "kfid", a.invitid AS "invitid", a.huanying AS "huanying", a.isneibu AS "isneibu", a.ipwhite AS "ipwhite", a.city AS "city", a.model AS "model", a.regip AS "regip", a.noadd AS "noadd", a.isvip AS "isvip", a.viptime AS "viptime", a.lianghao AS "lianghao", a.endtime AS "endtime", a.autofanyi AS "autofanyi", a.biandabianyi AS "biandabianyi", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate",
mb.title AS "mb.title", a.mbid AS mbid, a.payment_Address as paymentAddress, a.receiving_Address as receivingAddress, a.two_factor_code as twoFactorCode, a.point_total as pointTotal, a.two_factor_time as twoFactorTime
LEFT JOIN t_mibao_faq mb ON mb.id = a.mbid
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT uid, MAX(create_date) AS last_login_date FROM t_login_log WHERE status = 1 GROUP BY uid ) ll ON ll.uid = a.id
mapper.select: SELECT id, nickname, idno FROM t_member WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT DISTINCT city, count(1) as `count` FROM t_member WHERE city != '' GROUP BY city
SELECT DISTINCT model, count(1) as `count` FROM t_member WHERE model != '' GROUP BY model
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_member(id, phone, acount, eqno, idno, qrcode, qrcode2, nickname, icon, sex, img, chat_img, sign, state, balance, password, paypwd, mbid, mbda, ziti, show_quan, is_add_yz, is_quan_tx, is_msg_tx, acc_serch, phone_serch, gro_add, mp_add, qr_add, xcxurl, eqid, kfid, invitid, city, model, regip, create_date, update_date) VALUES (#{id}, #{phone}, #{acount}, #{eqno}, #{idno}, #{qrcode}, #{qrcode2}, #{nickname}, #{icon}, #{sex}, #{img}, #{chatImg}, #{sign}, #{state}, #{balance}, #{password}, #{paypwd}, #{mb.id}, #{mbda}, #{ziti}, #{showQuan}, #{isAddYz}, #{isQuanTx}, #{isMsgTx}, #{accSerch}, #{phoneSerch}, #{groAdd}, #{mpAdd}, #{qrAdd}, #{xcxurl}, #{eqid}, #{kfid}, #{invitid}, #{city}, #{model}, #{regip}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate})
mapper.select:
select
from t_member where receiving_address = #{receivingAddress} limit 1
mapper.update: UPDATE t_member SET two_factor_code = NULL, two_factor_time = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT a.id AS "id", a.acount AS "acount", a.eqno AS "eqno", a.idno AS "idno", a.nickname AS "nickname", a.paypwd AS "paypwd", a.password AS "password", a.mbid AS "mbid", a.mbname AS "mbname", a.mbda AS "mbda", a.lianghao AS "lianghao", a.state AS "state", a.create_date AS "createDate" FROM t_member a WHERE a.id = #{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_member
mbid = #{mbid},
mbname = #{mbname},
mbda = #{mbda},
WHERE idno = #{id}
UPDATE t_member SET mbid = NULL, mbname = NULL, mbda = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
